<!-- Chart CH-TAB-03 KPI TABLE rendered in language DL-06 LEX -->

## KPI TABLE chart, LEX style

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Every position, size, and color below is exact. No adjectives, no improvisation.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-TAB-03",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "lookup",
    "status",
    "trend"
  ],
  "form": "table rows: exact value, signed change, micro-trend",
  "data_required": "3-8 metrics with a current value, a delta, a 4+ point history, and a declared good direction",
  "family": "TAB",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-TIM-06 (shape only, no exact lookup)",
    "CH-RNK-06 (one comparable measure with bars)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "rows share one unit and rank matters",
      "use": "CH-RNK-06"
    },
    {
      "when": "only direction matters",
      "use": "CH-TIM-06"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- executive KPI panels: exact number, change, and shape in one row
- metrics with different units that must live on one page

Do NOT use when:
- rows sharing one unit where bars would rank them (CH-RNK-06)
- long histories (the trend cell is a shape, not a chart)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title with a number",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "value_header": "CAPS",
  "delta_header": "CAPS",
  "trend_header": "CAPS",
  "rows": "[{label, value: formatted string, delta, good: up|down, trend}]"
}
```

### Rules
- values arrive formatted with their own units: this is a lookup table
- delta colored by the row's DECLARED good direction, not by sign
- trend cells scale per row: shape only
- hairline rules, no zebra fills

### Never do this
- zebra striping
- coloring deltas by sign when down is good
- reading trend cells against each other
- traffic-light cell fills

### QA before delivering
- [ ] good direction declared per row
- [ ] values carry their units
- [ ] >= 4 trend points per row
- [ ] source present

### Colors (resolved, use these exact values)

| Element | Color |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| header | `#333333` |
| rule | `#B9B9B9` |
| category_label | `#1A1A1A` |
| value_label | `#1A1A1A` |
| delta_pos | `#333333` |
| delta_neg | `#7A1F1F` |
| trend | `#B9B9B9` |
| dot | `#7A1F1F` |
| title | `#1A1A1A` |
| source | `#333333` |

### Fonts

- Title font: Georgia,serif, weight 700
- All other text: Georgia,serif, weight 400 (600 on highlighted items)

### Language chrome

No kicker, no eyebrow; title at the default y.
